mapper.sql: id, model_name, input_price_fen_per_million, output_price_fen_per_million, enabled, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agent_model_pricing ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_model_pricing (model_name, input_price_fen_per_million, output_price_fen_per_million, enabled, updated_at) VALUES (#{modelName}, #{inputPriceFenPerMillion}, #{outputPriceFenPerMillion}, #{enabled}, #{updatedAt})
